---
title: "Henry Yin"
format: html
---

# Henry Yin

Statistics and Data Science student at UCLA.

## About Me

I am currently studying Statistics and Data Science at the University of California, Los Angeles.\
Before transferring to UCLA, I studied Computer Science at Santa Monica College.

I am interested in:

-   Data science
-   Machine learning
-   Data analysis
-   Statistical modeling

## Education

**University of California, Los Angeles**\
B.S. Statistics and Data Science\
Expected Graduation: 2026

**Santa Monica College**\
Computer Science

## Skills

Programming: - Python - R - SQL - C++

Tools: - RStudio - Power BI - Excel
